case_title: AARON MARTINEZ VS. ARTURO VEGA FERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA HEARING SET FOR DEC-23-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF,RETURNED UNABLE TO FORWARD.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, AARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA $363.68 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $363.68, PLAINTIFF WILL RECEIVE 1/2 DEPOSIT LESS RENT OWED AT THE TIME HE MOVED OUT. THIS LEAVES PLAINTIFF OWING $36.32, HOWEVER PLAINTIFF SHOULD RECEIVE PARTIAL DEPOSIT FROM NEW TENANT LESS THE $36.32. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY ARTURO VEGA FERNANDEZ IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $121.23 ON JANUARY 1, 2010, FEBRUARY 1, 2010 AND MARCH 1, 2010. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: JEFFREY ROSS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,942.50 FILED BY MARTINEZ, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED OCT-15-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH RILES FILED BY MARTINEZ, AARON FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. GRABIEL CASTANEDA INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, ARTURO VEGA ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
